name: Space Coast Credit Union | Bird Road | Miami, FL
description_short: Space Coast Credit Union is a federally insured credit union offering checking, savings, mortgages, auto loans, and credit cards with multiple Florida branch locations.
description_long: Space Coast Credit Union (SCCU) is a credit union operating throughout Florida with a physical branch at 5785 SW 40th St in Miami on Bird Road. The institution serves members with a full suite of consumer banking and lending products, positioning itself as a member-owned financial cooperative rather than a traditional bank. SCCU offers comprehensive deposit products including multiple checking account types (Free, Interest-bearing, Student, and Health Savings), savings accounts (Regular, Money Market, My Way, Christmas Club, and Youth), and Certificates of Deposit with their own CDs and IRA CDs available. The credit union provides substantial lending products spanning mortgages (conventional fixed-rate, FHA, VA, construction-to-permanent, jumbo, adjustable-rate, and refinancing options), auto loans with pre-approval and refinancing, recreational vehicle and boat financing, personal loans, and share-secured loans. SCCU distinguishes itself through specialized mortgage products like no-down-payment loans and no-closing-costs options, plus Hero Loans targeting military members and first responders. The Bird Road location specifically features a drive-thru, safe deposit boxes, coin sorter, drive-up ATM, and deposit-taking ATM, with extended hours (9am-5pm weekdays in lobby, 8am-6pm weekdays at drive-thru, and Saturday morning hours). An honest assessment reveals SCCU is a legitimate, traditional credit union with broad product offerings typical of larger regional institutions. However, as a credit union rather than a bank, membership eligibility may have restrictions, and the website provided limited detail on specific rates, fees, or membership requirements that would substantially differentiate it from competitors. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Extensive mortgage product lineup including specialized offerings like no-down-payment and no-closing-costs home loans
Multiple account types for different member needs (student checking, health savings, youth savings, Christmas club)
Extended drive-thru hours (8am-6pm weekdays, 9am-1pm Saturday) providing convenient access
Safe deposit boxes and on-site coin sorter available at Bird Road location
Shared branching network across Florida for conducting transactions at multiple locations
Federally insured credit union with established routing number (263177903)
Digital banking options including Zelle, mobile deposit, and digital wallet payments
cons: Website does not clearly disclose membership eligibility requirements or restrictions typical of credit unions
Specific APR rates, fees, and product terms not disclosed on the location page
Limited transparency on whether membership is open to all or restricted by employer/affiliation
Branch is only open until 5pm weekdays in lobby (9am-5pm), limiting accessibility for working professionals
best_for: Florida residents seeking a full-service credit union with physical branches and extended drive-thru hours
Military members and first responders eligible for Hero Loans with potentially favorable terms
Homebuyers looking for specialized mortgage programs including FHA, VA, and no-closing-costs options
diagnosis: Space Coast Credit Union is best for Florida-based consumers seeking a traditional, federally insured credit union with comprehensive banking and lending services, particularly those interested in mortgages or auto loans. The main caveat is that specific membership eligibility requirements, interest rates, and fee structures were not disclosed on the website, requiring direct contact to the Bird Road branch or member verification before opening an account.
services: Certificates of Deposit (CDs and IRA CDs)
Auto Loans with pre-approval and refinancing
Visa Credit Cards (Signature, Platinum, Low Rate, Secured, Student)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
